title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF CONCEPCION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAUG, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2016 / 50 OG No. 7, 2937 (July, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1046, June 12, 1954 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF CONCEPCION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAUG, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Concepcion in the municipality of Saug, Province of Davao, is hereby constituted into a barrio of the said municipality to be known as the barrio of Concepcion.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1954.
